issue_title: The log is over of the panel
issue_body_preview:
Firstly, thanks this awesome tool 👍 . Anyway, I run up webpack-dashboard successfully, but got some  layout over.

Like following, there's some warning text may too long so that it over the panel(First line).
![Before broken](http://i.imgur.com/lU8NHpq.png)

Maybe a hidden text or scroll is better s
test_description_zh: 启动 webpack-dashboard，观察日志面板中包含较长警告文本时的显示情况，检查文本是否正确限制在面板边界内。
expected_result_zh: 当日志面板中出现较长的警告文本时，文本应被截断或可滚动显示，不会溢出面板边界，面板布局保持正常完整。
